title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-28
body: We reviewed 6 open reports today. Two high-severity cases resulted in permanent bans: one user (spam_wave_42) was banned for distributing phishing links across 6 channels within 20 minutes; a second user (toxic_runner) was banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. A third high-severity report against a core maintainer was confirmed a false positive resulting from a coordinated brigading campaign and was closed with no action taken. The remaining medium- and low-severity reports (dispute, suspicious automation, formatting) are under continued review. We remain committed to keeping this community safe and welcoming.
